successCriteria.description: src/modules/policy/policy.service.ts exists and exports IPolicyService with concrete implementation PolicyServiceImpl
src/modules/balance/balance.service.ts exists and exports IBalanceService with concrete implementation BalanceServiceImpl
PolicyServiceImpl.validateLeaveRequest returns ValidationResult with isValid boolean and errors array containing validation failure messages

BalanceServiceImpl.updateBalance calls ILeaveBalanceRepository.updateWithAtomicIncrement with balanceId and usedDaysDelta, ensuring atomic increment/decrement of usedDays and remainingDays in a single database transaction

constraints: GP-001 Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces
GP-002 Audit records: All state-changing operations write an audit record
GP-003 Input validation: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing
GP-004 No sensitive data in logs: Never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data
GP-006 Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled
Dependency direction: leave -> policy, leave -> balance (no reverse dependencies permitted)
Balance deductions occur only during approveLeaveRequest (not in this phase)
Notifications are created on submission, approval, and rejection events (not in this phase)
outOfScope: LeaveRequest lifecycle state management (Pending, Approved, Rejected)
Integration with employee module beyond using Employee model
Orchestration layer that coordinates policy and balance services
API endpoints for policy or balance services

ambiguities.description: The intent mentions 'Approximately 5 files total' but only specifies 2 service files and their tests. What are the other 3 files?
options: Only the 2 service files and their test files (4 total)
Additional test files for repository interfaces

ambiguities.description: Should the PolicyServiceImpl constructor accept ILeavePolicyRepository directly, or should it accept a factory/provider?
Should updateBalance method validate that usedDaysDelta doesn't exceed remainingDays before calling repository?
options: Yes, validate in service layer before repository call
No, let repository/business logic handle overflow validation
